name: Jazz (CoAI Framework)
pricing_notes: Framework open source; Jazz Cloud sync infrastructure: free tier generous (invite-based); paid plans TBD

auth.notes: Identity-based via Jazz accounts (passkeys or crypto keypairs); no traditional auth server needed

performance.notes: Local-first; reads from local storage; syncs async in background; near-zero read latency

agent_readiness.notes: CoAI (Collaborative AI) framework for local-first apps. Typed collaborative objects that sync via CRDT. React/Vue/Svelte bindings. Works offline, syncs when connected. Identity via cryptographic accounts. Radically simpler than YJS for many use cases.

gotchas: Infrastructure still invite-based for Jazz Cloud sync
Less battle-tested than YJS or Liveblocks for production
Mental model shift required (no traditional database)
best_when: Building collaborative apps with local-first architecture (text editors, whiteboards)
Agents that need shared state with users in real-time without backend complexity
Apps requiring offline-first with automatic conflict resolution
Teams wanting YJS-like CRDT without the YJS complexity
summary: Jazz is a local-first collaborative application framework using CRDTs (Collaborative Objects). Provides typed reactive objects that sync across devices/users via Jazz Cloud. Simpler API than raw YJS while supporting offline-first. Cryptographic identity means no auth server. Early-stage but growing fast in the local-first community.
